variants.title: Mann Filter WK 940/15 Fuel Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P550496
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter WK 940/15 Fuel Filter | Replaces the Donaldson P550496
variants.description: MANN-FILTER Fuel filters for high pressures remove unwanted and damaging dirt particles and water from the fuel and thus prevent possible damage due to wear and corrosion. Highest separation efficiency and sealing ensure functional reliability and protection during the entire maintenance interval / Reinforced or special materials suitable for use at elevated pressures.
specifications: Style: Fuel Filter, Dimension A: 93.0 mm, Dimension B: 62.0 mm, Dimension C: 71.0 mm, Dimension G: M16x1.5, Dimension H: 144.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 95%, Outer Diameter: 96.0 mm, Length: 142.0 mm, Media Type: Cellulose, Thread: M16 x 1.5

variants.title: Donaldson P550496 Fuel/Water Separator Spin-On
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P550496 Fuel/Water Separator Spin-On is engineered to deliver reliable performance and durability across a wide range of applications. Designed with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality while meeting demanding operational requirements. Whether used in industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty settings, this component offers dependable operation and longevity. Its versatile design makes it suitable for various uses, supporting system efficiency and overall performance.
specifications: Style: Fuel/Water Separator Spin-On, Media: Cellulose, Efficiency 1: 95%, Outer Diameter: 96.0 mm, Length: 142.0 mm, Thread: M16 x 1.5, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 95%, Media Type: Cellulose
